title: STASH-POLICY
description: Per-repo stash retention policy. Authority: flywheel-m9yxr research + templates/flywheel-install/doctrine/git-stash-discipline.md. Mission Duty 3 (substrate-published).

max_age_days.description: Stashes older than this are auto-archived then dropped. Doctrine: stash=24h scratch; max=30 days is a generous grace before forced archive.

auto_archive_path.description: Off-tree archive directory. Pattern '<ts>--stash-<n>--<message-slug>.patch' per stash. Survives the drop for forensic recovery.

notable.description: N≥this surfaces in tick output (no block).

bead_filing.description: N≥this files a stash-cleanup bead (no block).

halt.description: N≥this refuses close + halts lane (per stash-discipline-check.sh).

named_trauma_classes.description: Stash messages matching these substrings flag as paradigm violations.

default.remediation: File via `br create -p 2 -t bug "..."`; stash is the wrong tool.
`git restore <paths>`; tick-generated drift is restorable, not stashable.

exempt_stash_message_prefixes.description: Stash messages starting with these prefixes get max_age_days exemption (still age-out at 90d hard cap).

hard_cap_days.description: Absolute ceiling — no stash survives this regardless of exempt prefixes.
